name: Arthur Evans
contribution: Opened the original Adelaide chapel in 1922. Pastored it for almost thirty years.

name: Edward Evans
contribution: Grew the South Australian family. Ordained the first cross-Pacific partnerships.

name: Andrew Evans
contribution: Planted the first US campus. Handed the seat to Ashley.

name: Ashley & Jane Evans
contribution: Global Senior Pastors. Took Futures from four campuses to twenty-one.
